Home > Guides > Models

Models Introduction

MiniMax provides several AI models for different use cases.

Available Models

Choose the right model for your task:

ModelUse CaseContext
MiniMax-M1General chat128k tokens
MiniMax-M2.5Advanced reasoning256k tokens

Quick Start

Here's a simple example:

from openai import OpenAI

client = OpenAI(base_url="https://api.minimax.chat/v1")
response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="MiniMax-M1",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello!"}]
)
print(response.choices[0].message.content)

Make sure to set your API key before making requests.

All models support streaming responses.

Next Steps

Check out the API Reference for full details.
